name: @kynticai/scout-connector-test-harness
description: Local test harness for validating KynticAI Scout connectors against public interfaces — manifest shape, metadata extraction, entity mapping, error handling, and unsafe field checks.

scripts.prebuild: npm --prefix ../scout-connector-validator install --no-save --no-package-lock && npm --prefix ../scout-connector-validator run build && npm --prefix ../scout-metadata-audit install --no-save --no-package-lock && npm --prefix ../scout-metadata-audit run build
